title: brassica repanda subsp. maritima
intro: Brassica repanda subsp. maritima, also known as wild rocket or sea rocket, is a wild, coastal plant species belonging to the Brassica genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Brassica repanda subsp. maritima include its potential to support digestive health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be added to salads and other dishes for its peppery flavor.
